hero.description: The first and only lab in Syria certified ISO 9001:2015 (UK). For physicians, lab professionals, and patients — our services are for everyone.

editorial.portraitAlt: Clinical laboratory professional reviewing diagnostic quality standards
editorial.precisionBody: Our automated validation ensures laboratory-grade accuracy across 4,000+ diagnostic protocols.
editorial.sectionTitle: The visionary standard in modern pathology
editorial.p1: Al Mutawali Lab stands for clinical integrity. We combine classical pathology rigor with modern data science.
editorial.p2: Our facility is built for speed without compromise. End-to-end automation gives clinicians curated data ready for decisions.

services.title: Diagnostic ecosystem
services.subtitle: From routine screening to advanced molecular sequencing — the foundation of clinical precision.
services.gridSubtitle: Options for patients, physicians, laboratory partners, and companies — all under one roof.
services.patientBody: Care that respects each patient’s needs: attentive support and fast, accurate lab work you can trust.
services.doctorBody: Your convenience comes first — lab services that meet the highest quality standards.
services.labBody: We are proud of the trust labs place in us across multiple governorates.
services.companyBody: We earn trust through distinctive, wide-ranging services for organizations.
services.electronicBody: Online tools for booking blood draws, viewing and printing results, and checking test requirements and pricing.
services.genomicsBody: Whole genome sequencing and personalized medicine mapping for oncology and rare disorders.
services.biochemBody: Automated serum analysis with real-time tracking.
services.hemaBody: Cellular profiling with laser flow cytometry.
services.microBody: Rapid pathogen ID and culture sensitivity.
services.imagingBody: Integrating pathology with high-resolution digital imaging for complete patient profiles.

quality.title: Gold-standard quality assurance
quality.tripleBody: Every high-risk sample is verified by three independent pathology leads before release.
quality.aiBody: Real-time calibration monitored by our proprietary neural link.

departments.title: Centers of specialization
departments.subtitle: High-performance departments led by world-class specialists.
departments.gridSubtitle: Explore our departments — everything you need to reach the right diagnosis.
departments.molBody: Uncovering the genetic blueprint of disease at a molecular level.
departments.toxBody: Drug screening and therapeutic monitoring with LC-MS/MS for unmatched specificity.
departments.hormonalBody: Comprehensive hormone and chemistry panels on the latest internationally accredited automated platforms.
departments.immuneBody: Advanced immunology and serology — viral and blood panels for accurate, complete patient insight.

branchesMap.subtitle: Find us on the map — zoom and explore our Damascus branches.

hero.description: We merge deep biological insight with advanced robotics to redefine diagnostic precision.

heritage.b1998: Bringing global clinical standards to the region.
heritage.b2012: First fully automated diagnostic chain, reducing human error by 85%.
heritage.b2024: AI-driven predictive pathology anticipating outcomes before symptoms.
heritage.quote: "Precision is not an act, but a habit of the environment we create."

methodology.title: The Al Mutawali methodology
methodology.m1Body: Next-generation sequencing with zero false-positive tolerance.
methodology.m3Body: Life-critical data in under 12 hours with absolute fidelity.
methodology.m4Body: We deliver a narrative — reports designed for immediate, life-saving actions.

leadership.subtitle: World-class clinicians who see diagnostics as art and science.
leadership.l1Bio: Oncological diagnostics and genetic medicine — 20+ years.
leadership.l2Bio: Automated lab architecture and computational bio-security.
leadership.l3Bio: Maintaining the region’s most accredited facility.

subscriptions.vouchersSubtitle: Limited-time lab benefits for your tier.

hero.description: Our patient services respect each person’s need for care, attention, and speed — delivering lab work with accuracy and skill so results are correct and timely.

pillars.missionBody: Deliver trusted, effective, timely, and affordable lab services to patients, physicians, and healthcare providers through advanced equipment, outstanding medical and technical staff, and premium materials from leading global manufacturers.
pillars.visionBody: Uphold the highest international standards for laboratory services and quality, ensuring accuracy in results and health awareness across the region — better service for patients, physicians, clients, and the lab profession.
pillars.messageBody: We believe diagnostic accuracy and speed support correct treatment. We work diligently to be the first choice for outstanding lab services through the latest devices, reagents, and a highly capable, effective team.
pillars.quote: "Your health is the foundation — you can rely on our services."

approach.title: The Al Mutawali approach
approach.c1Body: We combine the latest scientific techniques with leading specialists in medical testing to deliver the most accurate results across the board.
approach.c2Body: We strive to meet global quality standards under ISO 15189 for medical laboratories.
approach.c3Body: We focus on accurate, fast testing and reporting while maintaining the highest quality standards.
approach.c4Body: We prioritize comfort and service for patients and physicians, with the lab medical director always available to support doctors and remove obstacles.

features.subtitle: A broad suite of first-of-their-kind digital services in Syria to simplify life for patients and physicians.
features.f1Body: Patient results are available on the treating physician’s account as soon as they are released, with access to the full medical record.
features.f2Body: Physicians can order tests from the clinic via our website, track requests, and receive results immediately when ready.
features.f3Body: A large menu of medical tests covering everything physicians need for diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up.

cta.subtitle: Join healthcare providers who trust Al Mutawali with their most complex diagnostic challenges.
